λa.description: Constant failure rate per hour for each power supply when all eight are operating.

λb.description: Failure rate per hour for each remaining power supply when one has already failed (λa ≤ λb).

μ.description: Constant repair rate per hour for a failed power supply.

P0(t).description: Probability that the system is in State 0 (all 8 units working) at time t.

P1(t).description: Probability that the system is in State 1 (7 units working, 1 failed) at time t.

P2(t).description: Probability that the system is in State 2 (more than one unit failed, system down) at time t.

number_of_power_supplies.description: Total number of identical active power supplies in the system, used to determine transition rates (8λa from State 0, 7λb from State 1).
